_note: Per-axis selection tunables (Plans A-E). Hot-editable; read with a robust fallback to built-in defaults so a malformed edit never breaks the pipeline. Plan A = arc_completeness (the only axis implemented so far). See AIclippingPipelineVault/wiki/concepts/plan-arc-completeness.md.

arc_completeness._note: Structural 'is this a complete, self-contained setup->payoff arc?' score in [0,1] -> a gentle, category-aware multiplier on Pass C raw_score. Boost-leaning, never gates. neutral_point is the completeness at which the multiplier is exactly 1.0; below it = mild penalty, above = mild boost.
